package rulefixtures

// scenario for fmt_print_of_sensitive_struct: `fmt.Sprintf("%+v", user)` or `fmt.Printf("%v", config)` on structs that contain password/secret/token fields
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
type Rule711NegativeRecord struct { UserID string; TokenID string }

func scenario711Negative(user Rule711NegativeRecord) string {
	return user.UserID + ":" + user.TokenID
}
